title: Automation Hub
description: Step inside an interactive, retro-styled command-line console powered by real-time execution logic. Test interactive execution scripts built to showcase system scripting and visual feedback loops — cinematic ASCII banners, animated progress bars, radar scans, and rocket launch finales.

scripts.title: The Reconnaissance Tool
scripts.description: Execute live-style radar scans and host discovery scripts that map local network boundaries and inspect endpoint availability in real time. Watch an animated progress bar and live endpoint tree build before your eyes.
highlights: ASCII radar scan with cinematic output

scripts.title: The DevOps Framework
scripts.description: Trigger multi-stage environment deployment simulations complete with validation checks, automated health probes, and a rocket launch finale on success. Pick an environment and follow a staged launch — progress bars for each phase, then lift-off.
highlights: Cinematic execution flow with custom ASCII title banners
Multi-phase progress UI with automated health probes
Rocket ASCII animation — launch complete finale
